name: Dark General Freed
name_jp: ダーク・ジェネラル フリード
desc: Cannot be Special Summoned. Negate any Spell effects that target a face-up DARK monster(s) you control, and if you do, destroy that Spell Card. During your Draw Phase, instead of conducting your normal draw: You can add 1 Level 4 DARK monster from your Deck to your hand. This card must be face-up on the field to activate and to resolve this effect.
mnst_eff: Cannot be Special Summoned. Negate any Spell effects that target a face-up DARK monster(s) you control, and if you do, destroy that Spell Card. During your Draw Phase, instead of conducting your normal draw: You can add 1 Level 4 DARK monster from your Deck to your hand. This card must be face-up on the field to activate and to resolve this effect.
eff: Cannot be Special Summoned. Negate any Spell effects that target a face-up DARK monster(s) you control, and if you do, destroy that Spell Card. During your Draw Phase, instead of conducting your normal draw: You can add 1 Level 4 DARK monster from your Deck to your hand. This card must be face-up on the field to activate and to resolve this effect.

sets.set: Legendary Collection 3: Yugi's World Mega Pack

mst: Negates the effects of Spell Cards
